failures.description: The agent incorrectly synthesized the answer from the catalog results by omitting item_id 5312063289, which met all requested criteria.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for available Skateboards with deck material=bamboo costing more than $194.56. The tool output at index 3 contained all required evidence. Four items satisfy the price condition: 4293355847 ($200.8), 5312063289 ($195.15), 6956751343 ($217.06), and 8176740019 ($208.6). At index 4, the Executor used the tool output but omitted item_id 5312063289 despite its price being above $194.56. This reflects considering or reasoning over only part of the tool output.
